session_note: S28 Phase 2 finale: procedural transforms on zap.png + lightning-crackle audio + NetSnapshot v2 + 1v1 sync + wall-clock tick-deterministic refactor. Scope-Q1 USER-LOCKED option-1 (procedural transforms, NOT new Imagen spritesheet) + scope-Q2 option-a (deploy existing lightning-crackle.ogg, NOT procedural Web Audio synth). A.0 6 deltas surfaced pre-PDR: Delta1 off-model-v1 sprites unusable archive only voltkin-zap.png canonical; Delta2 lightning-crackle.ogg 18KB exists assets-source not deployed public; Delta3 NetSnapshot=Omit<WorldSnapshot> creatures not in WorldSnapshot needs additive optional; Delta4 wall-clock setTimeout in cutsceneOverlay.ts:152 not main.ts; Delta5 schemaVersion=1 locked S15 P2 use additive-optional pattern; Delta6 AnimatedSprite import zero usages in src.

priorities.label: Voltkin Phase 2D polish + 1v1 sync + audio + tick-deterministic refactor (procedural transforms + lightning-crackle.ogg + NetSnapshot v2 creatures + cutsceneOverlay wall-clock removal)
priorities.check_method: Standard-tier Council pipeline executed end-to-end: (1) A.0 STATE-DISCOVERY GATE ran 7 probes against blueprint S28 AC#1 + scope claims. 6 deltas surfaced — biggest was that the 14-frame spritesheet blueprint assumed did NOT exist (only voltkin-zap.png canonical; 5 character poses parked as `off-model-v1/` with explicit 'do not regress' README from S22 P4 side-session). Also: lightning-crackle.ogg (18KB) existed in assets-source/audio/ but NOT deployed to public/. NetSnapshot was Omit<WorldSnapshot,...> and WorldSnapshot did NOT include creatures (S25 deliberate 'ephemeral, never serialized'). onCinematicHandoff wall-clock setTimeout was in cutsceneOverlay.ts:152, not main.ts. schemaVersion=1 locked since S15 P2 — additive-optional pattern applies. No AnimatedSprite import in src/. (2) Surfaced Δ1 (animation path) as USER decision before PDR lock — 3 options (Imagen v2 side-session vs procedural transforms on zap.png vs defer-all-animation). User locked option-1 (procedural transforms) + option-a (deploy existing OGG). Scope-shaping at the right moment per Rule 21. (3) Standard-tier batch PDR drafted: 8-field template w/ 13 ACs + 14 explicit OOS items + 8 risks + 5-Q Council deliberation plan + PDR GATE writeback plan + completion protocol + token budget projection ~42K. User approved with 'approved!' (final go after scope-Q + PDR). (4) PDR GATE fields written to session-state.json top-level + per-priority P0: pdr_approved=true + deliberation_completed=false initially + tier=Standard + unlock_source=user. (5) Council R1 parallel via grok_chat + gemini_chat MCP on 5 Q's: Q1 NetSnapshot schema (additive-optional vs version bump vs wrapper) UNANIMOUS A; Q2 pending-spawn flag (single-slot vs array vs piggyback) UNANIMOUS A; Q3 wind-up tint curve (linear vs ease-in vs pulse-and-build) Gemini-B over Grok+Claude-A COMPROMISE at equal LOC cost; Q4 SerializedCreature shape (full vs trimmed-render-only vs minus-prevPos) Grok+Gemini B 2/3 over Claude-A; Q5 animation purity (pure helpers vs class methods vs hybrid) UNANIMOUS A. Clean first-pass BOTH models (no Grok timeout this round, no hallucinations against the structured Q template). (6) Battle Ledger synthesized: 3 UNANIMOUS (Q1 A, Q2 A, Q5 A) + 1 COMPROMISE Q3 B Gemini-minority over Claude-default-A (game-feel argument at equal LOC cost) + 1 2/3 Q4 B Grok+Gemini over Claude-A (trimmed render-only ~44B savings, client never simulates so AI fields unused); deliberation_completed=true written. (7) PRIME-AUDIT 9 deltas: Δ1 WINDUP_TINT_EASE named arrow constant for single-LOC retune; Δ2 VOLTKIN_ATTACK_FIRE_TICK reused not hardcoded 30; Δ3 nullish-coalescing in applyNetSnapshot for pre-S28 saves back-compat; Δ4 Math.round in cinematicMsToTicks not Math.floor (4000→240, 4017→241, 4008→240); Δ5 GODLY_ABORT MUST clear pendingCreatureSpawn (zombie-spawn-after-abort fix per blueprint Edge Case #2); Δ6 single-slot overwrite dev-warn (Council Q2 sanctioned mitigation); Δ7 SerializedCreature readonly fields for client-side immutability; Δ8 tint explicit 0xFFFFFF return for non-wind-up branches (no undefined leak; boundary `<FIRE_TICK` not `<=`); Δ9 per-state scale formulas (SPAWNING sin(π·t/60) pulse to 1.15; SEEKING 2Hz 2.5% bob; ATTACKING fire 1.20 punch; DESPAWNING shrink to 0.8 over CREATURE_FADE_TICKS). (8) Implementation: 1 new test file (creatureRenderer.test.ts ~165 LOC w/ 28 tests across lerpHex/computeCreatureTint/computeCreatureScale boundary battery) + 1 new asset deploy (lightning-crackle.ogg copied from assets-source to public/ — 17.8 KB) + 13 edited (audioManager.ts BOND_SEVERED cause='creature' branch + LIGHTNING_CRACKLE_URL; creature.ts cinematicMsToTicks helper; creatureRenderer.ts WINDUP_TINT_EASE + lerpHex + computeCreatureScale + computeCreatureTint pure helpers + sync extended w/ scale+tint composition; cutsceneOverlay.ts setTimeout REMOVED + onCinematicHandoff field DELETED + abort() comment updated; cutsceneOverlay.test.ts gutted to 1 structural-shape test S28 wall-clock-removal-regression-lock; main.ts onCinematicHandoff callback REMOVED + pendingCreatureSpawn setter post-cutsceneOverlay.play + new Step 0 tick-poll before creature for-loop + cinematicMsToTicks import; save.ts WorldSnapshot creatures? additive-optional + SerializedCreature interface + serializeCreature + deserializeCreature + applySnapshotCore deserialize loop w/ nullish guard; save.test.ts 4 new tests (empty creatures; round-trip rehydrate trimmed shape; pre-S28 back-compat; CHECK C1/G1 nextCreatureId fix; CHECK C3 pendingCreatureSpawn clear); world.ts pendingCreatureSpawn field + makeWorld init null + GODLY_ABORT clear; godlyReducer.test.ts 2 new tests (fresh world pendingCreatureSpawn=null; GODLY_ABORT clears Δ5); creatureLifecycle.test.ts cinematicMsToTicks import + 5 new tests for the helper; audioManager.test.ts 2 new tests (creature cause + legacy godly cause). (9) Gates: typecheck clean via npx tsc --noEmit empty output; vitest run 535 passing initial via npx vitest run (494 baseline + 41 net new); vite build 463.47 KB main bundle via npx vite build (+1.60 KB vs 461.87 baseline, 36.53 KB headroom of 500 KB cap). (10) CHECK Triumvirate: RALPH:PATROL self-audit + GROK-ANALYST + GEMINI-AUDITOR via grok_chat + gemini_chat parallel. 8 concerns: 3 ACCEPTED code fixes + 5 REJECTED. ACCEPTED: Grok-C1 + Gemini-G1 (UNANIMOUS cross-Council P0) nextCreatureId collision on snapshot rehydrate — applySnapshotCore advances world.nextCreatureId = max(loaded-ids)+1 post-rehydrate so host save-load with live creatures doesn't re-mint collisions; Grok-C2 + Gemini-G4 (UNANIMOUS cross-Council P2) recovery scale denominator off-by-one — `recoverySpan` is `CADENCE-1 - recoveryStart` = 27 not `CADENCE - recoveryStart` = 28, so last visible ATTACKING tick (t=CADENCE-1) maps to scale=1.0 exactly with no SEEKING-handoff pop; Grok-C3 (P1) applySnapshotCore clears pendingCreatureSpawn for parity with creatures.clear() — host save mid-cinematic could otherwise re-fire schedule on load. REJECTED: Grok-C4 (=== vs >= boundary) — >= is correct for frame-drop catch-up scenarios where physicsAccumulator drains multiple ticks; Gemini-G2 (array-queue redesign for multi-creature pending) — relitigates Council Q2 UNANIMOUS A single-slot, 3x observation of Gemini self-contradiction R1-vs-CHECK pattern (S26-Q7+G2, S27-Q1+G1, S28-Q2+G2 all same Gemini); Gemini-G3 (spawnedAtTick reconstruction in deserializeCreature) — trimmed render-only shape (Council Q4 2/3 B) intentionally omits sim-only fields; host save-load with live creatures is out-of-scope edge case (creatures are ephemeral 8s, save normally at POSTGAME transition); Gemini-G2 (already in REJECTED above, no duplicate). RALPH carry-forward: none net-new — every CHECK concern resolved or documented. (11) Re-gates post-CHECK fixes: typecheck clean; vitest 537 passing (+2 new CHECK-fix tests for nextCreatureId advance + applySnapshotCore pendingCreatureSpawn clear); vite build 463.56 KB (+0.09 KB from fixes — still 36.44 KB headroom). (12) Browser smoke at preview port 16489/?debug=1: page loaded, 0 console errors, lightning-crackle.ogg served HTTP 200 (17.8 KB), canvas/app DOM root present. Full AC11 gameplay smoke (SQ4-TR4 chain trigger → cinematic → tick-deterministic spawn at world.tick+240 → creature with procedural transforms across 4 FSM states → ARC_FLASH + lightning-crackle audio per zap → DESPAWN with alpha-fade + scale-shrink → 1v1 client mirror via NetSnapshot v2) deferred to user manual playthrough — substantially upgraded from S27 (now creatures visually pulse + tint + flash + crackle audibly; client sees the mirror). (13) Committed a2f5b8e + pushed origin/master ae09441..a2f5b8e. Real-context tokens at close: 318043 / 1000000 (31.8% GREEN — well under 500K YELLOW threshold; 168K under S27 close baseline 338K). Bundle headroom remaining: 36.44 KB for S29+ (Anvil + Pac-Predator using proven Phase 2 architecture per-type CreatureConfig table Gemini Q2 carry from S26+S27). Zero regressions in 494 baseline tests; zero behavior change to Phase 1 cinematic playback or voice line; replay-deterministic spawn schedule replaces wall-clock setTimeout (S25 reflexion #6 honored).
